requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Suriname Local Fire Authority, IEC 62933-5-2, and NFPA 855 Reference Framework
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——苏里南当地消防主管机关、IEC 62933-5-2及NFPA 855参考框架
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——蘇里南當地消防主管機關、IEC 62933-5-2及NFPA 855參考框架

summary.en: Fire safety for buildings and industrial installations in Suriname is regulated under local fire authority jurisdiction. Suriname's regulatory tradition is Dutch-origin (inherited from the Kingdom of the Netherlands prior to independence in 1975), but the energy and construction sectors also draw on US and international practice, particularly in industrial and utility-scale projects. No publicly accessible Suriname-specific mandatory standard for BESS fire safety installation has been confirmed as of the dataset date. For utility-scale and C&I BESS projects in Suriname, the internationally expected technical references are: IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based electrical energy storage systems) for system-level electrochemical safety, and NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems) for fire protection design — both are referenced in international project specifications and are used by engineering firms active in the Caribbean and South American market. Building permit and fire-safety approval from the relevant Surinamese local authority (gemeente, bouwpolitie) is required before commissioning. Suriname is a member of CARICOM, and regional energy initiatives may reference IEC standards. The surge in BESS interest related to TotalEnergies' GranMorgu offshore oil production (first oil 2025) and associated onshore power infrastructure is likely to drive project-specific fire-safety requirements aligned with international EPC contractor standards.
summary.zh: 苏里南建筑和工业装置的消防安全由当地消防主管机关管辖。苏里南的监管传统源自荷兰（1975年独立前继承自荷兰王国），但能源和建筑行业，尤其在工业和公用事业规模项目中，亦借鉴美国和国际实践。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认苏里南公开发布专门针对BESS消防安全安装的强制标准。对于苏里南公用事业规模和工商业BESS项目，国际预期技术参考为：IEC 62933-5-2（电化学储能系统安全要求）用于系统级电化学安全，NFPA 855（固定式储能系统安装标准）用于消防设计——两者均在国际项目规格中被引用，并被活跃于加勒比海和南美市场的工程公司采用。在投入使用前须取得相关苏里南地方主管机关（市政、建设执法局）的建筑许可及消防安全审批。苏里南是CARICOM成员，区域能源倡议可能引用IEC标准。与TotalEnergies GranMorgu海上石油生产（2025年首油）及相关陆上电力基础设施相关的BESS投资增长，可能推动符合国际EPC承包商标准的项目专属消防安全要求。
summary.zht: 蘇里南建築和工業裝置的消防安全由當地消防主管機關管轄。蘇里南的監管傳統源自荷蘭（1975年獨立前繼承自荷蘭王國），但能源和建築行業，尤其在工業和公用事業規模項目中，亦借鑑美國和國際實踐。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認蘇里南公開發布專門針對BESS消防安全安裝的強制標準。對於蘇里南公用事業規模和工商業BESS項目，國際預期技術參考為：IEC 62933-5-2（電化學儲能系統安全要求）用於系統級電化學安全，NFPA 855（固定式儲能系統安裝標準）用於消防設計——兩者均在國際項目規格中被引用，並被活躍於加勒比海和南美市場的工程公司採用。在投入使用前須取得相關蘇里南地方主管機關（市政、建設執法局）的建築許可及消防安全審批。蘇里南是CARICOM成員，區域能源倡議可能引用IEC標準。與TotalEnergies GranMorgu海上石油生產（2025年首油）及相關陸上電力基礎設施相關的BESS投資增長，可能推動符合國際EPC承包商標準的項目專屬消防安全要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level safety reference expected in Suriname utility-scale BESS project specifications)
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation

NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (internationally dominant BESS fire-installation reference; likely referenced in EPC and project-owner specifications for Suriname utility-scale BESS; formal Suriname regulatory adoption unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify with local authority)

Suriname local building and fire authority (gemeente / bouwpolitie) — mandatory building permit and fire safety approval required before commissioning; specific statutory framework for BESS not confirmed as of dataset date

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review. GB 44240-2024 (effective August 1, 2025) includes mandatory fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules over 100 kWh. GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 cover system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority approval procedures under the Fire Protection Law of the People's Republic of China. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by Suriname local authorities as equivalent to IEC 62933-5-2 or NFPA 855 fire-installation requirements. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with IEC 62933-5-2 and NFPA 855-aligned design documentation for Suriname project authority review.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024（2025年8月1日起生效）包含100 kWh以上BESS电芯和模组的强制消防安全规定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023涵盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国的项目级消防审查依据《中华人民共和国消防法》由地方消防主管机关审批程序管控。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被苏里南地方主管机关认可为等同于IEC 62933-5-2或NFPA 855消防安装要求。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须在苏里南项目主管机关审查中补充符合IEC 62933-5-2和NFPA 855要求的设计文件。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024（2025年8月1日起生效）包含100 kWh以上BESS電芯和模組的強制消防安全規定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023涵蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國的項目級消防審查依據《中華人民共和國消防法》由地方消防主管機關審批程序管控。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被蘇里南地方主管機關認可為等同於IEC 62933-5-2或NFPA 855消防安裝要求。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須在蘇里南項目主管機關審查中補充符合IEC 62933-5-2和NFPA 855要求的設計文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems; includes system-level fire-safety provisions)

gap.en: Gap: No confirmed Suriname-specific mandatory BESS fire-safety installation standard has been identified as of the dataset date; however, local building permit and fire-safety approval from the competent Surinamese authority is a mandatory project gate before commissioning. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy the IEC 62933-5-2 and NFPA 855-aligned requirements expected in Suriname utility-scale and C&I BESS project specifications. Exporters and project teams should: (a) confirm directly with the competent local Surinamese building and fire authority (gemeente, bouwpolitie) the applicable statutory requirements for BESS fire safety and the technical standards references used in building permits; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with IEC 62933-5-2 and NFPA 855 — including thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection or ventilation design, suppression system design, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances; (c) engage a fire protection engineer familiar with Suriname local practice and international IEC/NFPA references for design review and local authority submission; (d) note that Dutch-language documentation is required for submissions to Surinamese local authorities.
gap.zh: 差距：截至本数据集日期，尚未确认苏里南专门针对BESS消防安全安装的强制标准；但是，在投入使用前须取得苏里南主管当地建筑和消防主管机关（市政、建设执法局）的强制项目批准。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不满足苏里南公用事业规模和工商业BESS项目规格中预期的IEC 62933-5-2和NFPA 855要求。出口商和项目团队应：（a）直接向苏里南主管当地建筑和消防主管机关（市政、建设执法局）确认BESS消防安全的适用法定要求及建筑许可中采用的技术标准参考；（b）准备符合IEC 62933-5-2和NFPA 855的BESS消防安全设计文件——包括热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测或通风设计、抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序及隔离距离；（c）聘请熟悉苏里南当地实践和IEC/NFPA国际参考的消防工程师进行设计审查和地方主管机关申报；（d）注意苏里南地方主管机关申报须使用荷兰语文件。
gap.zht: 差距：截至本數據集日期，尚未確認蘇里南專門針對BESS消防安全安裝的強制標準；但是，在投入使用前須取得蘇里南主管當地建築和消防主管機關（市政、建設執法局）的強制項目批准。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不滿足蘇里南公用事業規模和工商業BESS項目規格中預期的IEC 62933-5-2和NFPA 855要求。出口商和項目團隊應：（a）直接向蘇里南主管當地建築和消防主管機關（市政、建設執法局）確認BESS消防安全的適用法定要求及建築許可中採用的技術標準參考；（b）準備符合IEC 62933-5-2和NFPA 855的BESS消防安全設計文件——包括熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測或通風設計、抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序及隔離距離；（c）聘請熟悉蘇里南當地實踐和IEC/NFPA國際參考的消防工程師進行設計審查和地方主管機關申報；（d）注意蘇里南地方主管機關申報須使用荷蘭語文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — local building permit and fire-safety approval from competent Surinamese authority required before commissioning; specific statutory BESS fire standard not confirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with local authority
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project type, installation scale, and local fire authority requirements under the Fire Protection Law of the PRC

source.publisher: Government of Suriname (Republiek Suriname) — competent local building and fire authority for BESS fire-safety installation approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed Suriname-specific mandatory BESS fire-safety standard has been identified as of the dataset date; however, local building permit and fire-safety approval is a mandatory installation gate before commissioning. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy the IEC 62933-5-2 and NFPA 855-aligned requirements expected in Suriname utility-scale project specifications. Engage the competent local Surinamese authority and a fire protection engineer at the earliest project stage to confirm the applicable fire code and design requirements. Dutch-language authority submissions are required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，尚未确认苏里南专门的强制性BESS消防安全标准；但是，当地建筑许可和消防安全审批是投入使用前的强制安装门槛。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足苏里南公用事业规模项目规格中预期的IEC 62933-5-2和NFPA 855要求。在项目最早阶段，应与苏里南主管当地主管机关及消防工程师接触，确认适用消防规范和设计要求。须使用荷兰语提交主管机关文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，尚未確認蘇里南專門的強制性BESS消防安全標準；但是，當地建築許可和消防安全審批是投入使用前的強制安裝門檻。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足蘇里南公用事業規模項目規格中預期的IEC 62933-5-2和NFPA 855要求。在項目最早階段，應與蘇里南主管當地主管機關及消防工程師接觸，確認適用消防規範和設計要求。須使用荷蘭語提交主管機關文件。
